title: 38-0-0: Football Squad Draft
notes:
BUILD A PLAYER IS NOW PvP

Go head-to-head with players worldwide. You both get the same footballers, take one stat from each, and the highest overall player wins. Two re-spins, a 3 minute clock, and your own global ranked ladder.

In this update:
• Build a Player PvP: Ranked, Friendly, or Play a Friend
• A new Build leaderboard to climb
• GOAT nameplate and avatar: unlock them by building a 96+ rated player
• Matchmaking and stability improvements

Build the perfect player. Then prove it agains
